purpose: stable default policy for target-agent developer work orders
machine_boundary: This contract is the stable policy home for OMA developer work-order defaults. Active callers read this contract through their owner helper modules; no standalone policy projection helper owns this truth.
default_runtime_expected_outcomes: patched quality contract, owner route, or owner receipt contract is visible in target runtime/read-model projection
blocked suite redrive no longer parks as stale human handoff when target owner work remains
no forbidden target domain truth, artifact, memory, quality verdict, or submission readiness surface is written by opl-meta-agent
default_target_workspace_expected_outcom: target workspace dependency lock/profile includes required runtime extras before owner redrive
owner runtime entry uses the target workspace interpreter rather than target repo checkout .venv
owner redrive reports the analysis/runtime bundle as ready under the target workspace interpreter
repo hygiene proof shows no target checkout .venv or generated egg-info pollution
default_no_patch_closeout_evidence: target owner receipt projection consumed Agent Lab suite result
target owner receipt projection consumed opl-meta-agent coordination result
no target source patch was requested
no target domain truth, memory body, artifact body, quality verdict, or export verdict was written
default_source_patch_closeout_evidence: target workspace dependency lock/profile migrated when runtime extras are required
target owner entry redrive consumed the migrated workspace environment
repo hygiene proof shows no target checkout .venv or generated egg-info pollution
target agent status or decision docs updated

target_improvement_default_change_ref_po.retired_reason: generic owner-receipt/package/typed-blocker keyword mappings can create unowned patch targets
